questions.q: In nim, briefly describe what `tasks` is or does.
ref_phrases: A Task should be only owned by a single Thread, it cannot be shared by threads.
questions.source_excerpt: std/tasks Source Edit This module provides basic primitives for creating parallel programs. A Task should be only owned by a single Thread, it cannot be shared by threads. Example: import std/tasks block: var num = 0 proc hello(a: int) = inc num, a let b = toTask hello(13) b.invoke() assert num == 1
